title: 平台规则：AWS 平台规则变化
original_title: Transforming rare cancer research with Amazon Quick: Integrating biomedical databases for breakthrough discoveries
summary: In this post, we walk through how to use Amazon Quick Research to integrate biomedical data sources for rare cancer research. The walkthrough uses pediatric sarcoma as the research domain and draws on publicly available datasets from PubMed and other open biomedical repositories. It covers the end-to-end workflow: defining a research objective, configuring data sources, reviewing the AI-generated research plan, running the investigation, and iterating on results using the revision and versioning system.
source_category_title: AI 工具与开发者平台
topic_direction_description: AI 模型、Agent、开发工具、API、云服务和自动化能力变化。重点看它们会不会改变普通技术人的工作方式、成本结构和副业工具链。
